overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from GTA V showing a female character walking through a desert rural area with large rock formations and weathered wooden structures. The character moves steadily along a dirt path from an open rock area into a narrow passage alongside abandoned buildings under clear midday sun.

scene_state.functional_zone: open desert rock formation area with colorful painted wall

agents.ego_description: walking steadily forward through the desert rock formation toward the distant structures

entered.detail: large rock face with faded colorful paint markings visible on the left side
tall dark rock formation directly ahead blocking the path
tall palm trees visible in the distant background beyond the rocks

segments.scene_description: The character begins walking through an open desert area surrounded by large rock formations. A colorful painted rock wall stands prominently to the left while palm trees are visible in the distant background. The sandy dirt path leads toward a narrow gap between large boulders ahead.

scene_state.functional_zone: narrow rock canyon approaching weathered wooden buildings

events.description: colorful rock wall exits view as character enters narrower passage between rock formations

agents.ego_description: continuing forward through the rock passage as a weathered building comes into view ahead

entered.detail: dilapidated wooden shack with rusted metal roof and blood-like stains on the walls
scattered rusted barrels and metal sheets around the building entrance

segments.scene_description: Moving deeper between the rock formations, the space narrows slightly. The colorful wall disappears behind as a weathered wooden building with rusted metal elements becomes visible straight ahead. The ground remains sandy with sparse dry vegetation as the character approaches the structure.

scene_state.functional_zone: path alongside weathered shack with rock wall on opposite side

events.description: character moves to walk alongside the weathered building structure

agents.ego_description: walking alongside the weathered wooden building, passing between the structure and the rock wall

segments.scene_description: The character approaches and walks alongside the weathered wooden building, which shows signs of decay and rust stains. The path runs between the building on the left and rock formations on the right. The camera follows closely as the character continues past the structure into the narrow passage.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through an open desert landscape that gradually tightens into a narrow passage flanked by decaying structures. It begins with the character walking through a wide sandy area surrounded by large rock formations, passing a colorful painted wall with distant palm trees visible against the horizon. As the character moves forward, the open space narrows between boulders and the colorful wall recedes, bringing a weathered wooden building with rusted metal elements into view. The scene then shifts as the camera follows the character closely alongside the decaying building, navigating the tight corridor between the rusted walls and the adjacent rock formations. Finally, the path leads the character past the structure and deeper into the confined passage under the midday sun.
